title: Review Taskboard board and card parity
goal: Assess whether Taskboard board and card flows credibly meet the Trello-like parity bar and return bounded findings.

steps.text: Define the in-scope board/card flows and parity references for the review pass.
Evaluate the experience against taskboard-board-card-parity-checklist and interaction-quality-rubric.
Record findings by severity using the interaction-quality report contract with explicit Trello-reference mapping.
Classify result as `go`, `go-with-notes`, or `stop` and state whether parity claims are currently credible.
Pause for Samwise or AJ review before major remediation planning.

acceptanceCriteria: Each blocker or major issue has owner and disposition
Report states whether parity claims are currently credible
References are explicit instead of implied

verification.text: Confirm report includes parity credibility judgment and severity-tagged findings
